concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: The conversion exhibits a systematic failure to capture text that is formatted as links in the source PDF. This results in the omission of several critical pieces of information: 1) the legal citation 'SL 2024-26, Section 7' in the intro paragraph; 2) the reporting URL 'it.nc.gov/805' in the reporting requirements; 3) the policy title 'Acceptable Use Policy (AUP)' on page 2; and 4) header/footer URLs 'it.nc.gov'. These omissions represent a loss of the functional core of the directive document.
